resources.string: The goal of the game is to reach all of your destination cities and then return to your starting city.
At the beginning, each player receives a starting city and depending on the game mode 6, 12 or 18 destination cities.
Each round the player rolls the dice. The number determines the movement points. Train routes cost 1 point, flights cost 2 points.
You cannot enter a city where another player is located. You also cannot directly go back on the same route within one turn.
Each destination city has a minigame. Winning completes it, losing replaces it with a new one.
After completing all destinations, return to your starting city. The first player to do so wins.
